description: Two users in the same project have different secrets. A query scoped to user-alice must never return user-bob's content.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: My personal deploy token for this project is ALICE-TOKEN-XYZ.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: I set up the staging environment last week.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: My personal deploy token for this project is BOB-TOKEN-ABC.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: Bob uses a different configuration for local development.

query: what is my personal deploy token
